defect: anchor point inadequate (guessing at 5,000-lb rating - TRD)
prompt: Identify the safety hazards, their severity, and the immediate controls required.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Fall protection, part of the Safety & Rigging scope. The observed field condition is: anchor point inadequate (guessing at 5,000-lb rating - TRD). The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140.
title: Hazard check: Fall protection (commercial project)
